text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day has come for Rice Shower to make her
debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's feeling the pressure as her first race
approaches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she manages to shake off her fear and
muster up the courage to race.
